prompt: At medium depth in position, choose call.
why_v1: Call controls risk when depth edge is not strong enough to raise.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Calling fits because position still lets you realize medium-depth equity without inflating a pot before the edge is clean.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Call is better here because playing in position at this depth still lets you realize equity without forcing an oversized pot. A controlled continue keeps the hand flexible while your edge is not yet strong enough to turn into an immediate raise.
